NCO.Sheet.DeleteTrademarkConfirm: Delete this Trademark and all of its Triggers?
NCO.Sheet.EmptyTriggers: No Triggers yet. Click "Trigger" to add one.
NCO.Sheet.EmptyTrademarks: No Trademarks yet. Unlock edit mode and click "Trademark" to add one.
NCO.Sheet.InvokePositive: Click to add an Action die — Shift-click to add a Danger die instead
NCO.Sheet.InvokeNegative: Click to add a Danger die — Shift-click to add an Action die instead
NCO.Sheet.DeleteUniqueGearConfirm: Delete this Gear and all of its Tags?
NCO.Sheet.EmptyUniqueGear: No Unique Gear yet. Unlock edit mode and click "Unique Gear" to add one.
NCO.Sheet.EmptyGearTags: No Tags yet. Click "Tag" to add one.
NCO.Sheet.ToggleTagPolarity: Toggle between a positive (Action die) and negative (Danger die) Tag
NCO.Chat.DeathCheck.Title: Death Check
NCO.Chat.DeathCheck.Dying: {name} is DYING and will die in {turns} turn(s)!
NCO.Sheet.ToggleCondition: Mark whether this Condition is currently active
NCO.Sheet.BossHint: A Boss has triple the Hits of a normal Threat.
NCO.Sheet.InvokeDangerRating: Click to add this many Danger dice — Shift-click to add Action dice instead
NCO.Sheet.EmptyThreatTags: No Tags yet. Unlock edit mode and click "Tag" to add one.
NCO.Sheet.SpendStuntPoint: Click to spend a Stunt Point
NCO.Sheet.NoStuntPoints: {name} has no Stunt Points left to spend.
NCO.Sheet.StuntPointsMax: Total Stunt Points for this character
NCO.Sheet.TrackHintIncrement: Left-click to add, right-click to remove
NCO.Sheet.TrackHintFill: Click a box to set the level
NCO.Sheet.DriveHint: Click to tick, again to cross out, again to clear
NCO.Chat.StuntPoint.Title: Stunt Point Spent
NCO.Chat.StuntPoint.OptionTrademark: Add a second Trademark to the check
NCO.Chat.StuntPoint.OptionSoak: Soak all Hits from a single source
NCO.Chat.StuntPoint.OptionDetail: Add a detail or tag to the scene
NCO.Settings.StartingHits.Name: Starting Hits
NCO.Settings.StartingHits.Hint: How many Hits a newly created character begins with.
NCO.Settings.MaxHits.Name: Maximum Hits
NCO.Settings.MaxHits.Hint: The most Hits any character can grow to through advancement.
NCO.Settings.XPTrackLength.Name: XP Track Length
NCO.Settings.XPTrackLength.Hint: How many XP boxes appear on each character's advancement track.
NCO.Settings.TrackClickMode.Name: Track Click Behavior
NCO.Settings.TrackClickMode.Hint: How the Hits and XP tracks respond to clicks.
NCO.Settings.TrackClickMode.Fill: Click a box to fill to that level
NCO.Settings.DriveTrack.Name: Drive Track
NCO.Settings.DriveTrack.Hint: Show the optional Drive track on character sheets.
NCO.Settings.StashTrack.Name: Stash Track
NCO.Settings.StashTrack.Hint: Show the optional Stash track on character sheets.
NCO.Settings.StashTrackLength.Name: Stash Track Length
NCO.Settings.StashTrackLength.Hint: How many Stash boxes appear on each character's Stash track.
NCO.Settings.Pressure.Name: Pressure (optional rule)
NCO.Settings.Pressure.Hint: Show a shared GM Pressure track near the top of the screen. Each uncancelled 6 on a Danger die adds one Pressure, up to the track length.
NCO.Settings.PressureTrackLength.Name: Pressure Track Length
NCO.Settings.PressureTrackLength.Hint: How many boxes long the Pressure track is (its maximum value).
NCO.Pressure.Title: Pressure
NCO.Pressure.SetLevel: Click to set the Pressure level
NCO.RollDialog.Title: Neon City Overdrive — Roll
NCO.RollDialog.Hint: Click Tags on character sheets to add dice — positive Tags (Trademarks, Edges) add Action dice; negative Tags (Flaws, Traumas, Conditions) add Danger dice. Shift-click to invert. This pool is shared by all players.
NCO.RollDialog.AddBonusHint: Add an Action die for a situational bonus
NCO.RollDialog.AddPenaltyHint: Add a Danger die for a situational penalty
NCO.RollDialog.BaseDieHint: Every check always rolls at least one Action die.
NCO.RollDialog.NoGM: A GM must be connected to update the shared roll pool.
